summary: Frontend testing of Modbus simulator application - Critical authentication/session management issues prevent complete workflow testing. Login works but session persistence fails during navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Session expires or gets invalidated during navigation between pages
critical_bugs.impact: Users get logged out unexpectedly, preventing use of core features

critical_bugs.issue: Navigation between pages causes session loss and redirect to login
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks device management and tag browser functionality testing

integration_issues.issue: Session management fails during page transitions

passed_tests: Login form accepts admin@comgate.com / admin123 credentials
Initial dashboard loads after successful login
Project selection from dashboard works initially
UI elements are properly rendered with correct styling
Sidebar navigation is present and styled correctly
success_percentage: 30% - Login and initial dashboard work, but session management prevents further testing
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication/session management issues. Users get logged out during navigation between pages (dashboard to devices, etc.). This blocks testing of core functionality like device creation, tag browsing, polling, and simulator features. Investigate JWT token persistence, session timeout, and authentication middleware.
